title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #11, Oden, Orochi as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you do, then use this money...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to dress properly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AHAHAHA!! These do not suit us at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Learn some manners.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: SESSHA! (2

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: buy some books...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WRONG!! It has to come from the gut!! Like this, "Sessha"...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And fill your- selves with knowledge and wisdom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If hoodlums like you were to become the retainers of open as you are right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You would just bring shame to his name!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Oden, we bid you a good morning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This deep-fried tofu is simply exquisite!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you lot suddenly acting so strangely!? It is so creepy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He will one day be the Shogun of Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the people who will support him through it all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Must be the best samural in the entire country!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "A servant's duty is to protect their master!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of you must make yourselves the capital's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No... the entire country's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ooh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Guardians...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Three years later, 30 years from the present

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that the Daimyo of Kuri and his followers will be visiting the capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WaHaha!! Be sure to hide your money to avoid getting robbed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Oden and his retainers are thugs, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait there, Mr. Mountain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: oink

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Mountain Jr.! get in the crate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: oink oink

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Look! The party from Kuri has arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh my!! What? They are... his samural....!?

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Were Oden's retanners... Always so dignified!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My eyes must be deceiving me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: It almost looks like a Shogun's procession!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "Yo, Dad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have grown into a fine man, indeed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Everyone is shocked!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Majestic and dignified appearance of these Samuel...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their commanding presence could take your breath away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The Onlookers were in such awe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "That some may have even dropped down to their knees...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I have become a FINE MAN, it is thanks to you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I am not sure I have changed one bit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: cannot believe you are thanking me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Why do you look so out- raged!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden came to visit, after hearing his father had taken ill.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: However...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was the last time the two would ever speak.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: That same year- Kuri: Port itself

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We climbed the waterfall, didn't we...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So why is there a sea and an island up here....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can sense that there are other humans nearby.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pops!! It'll take a week to finish the repairs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cargo hold flooded, so our provisions are as good as gone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll go too-yol.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: No way, you're just an apprentice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll need to head out to find supplies. Any volunteers!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Basically everyone... We're tired of sitting around.

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Lord Oden went to the coast!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that a pirate ship was spotted at Port Itach!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is terrible....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They appear- entirely look different from other pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must have gone to chase them off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey, all of you... Stand back....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their ship is supposed to be huge, too...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did you let him go!? We must stop him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Some- thing's coming...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They must be pretty strong!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that is the case, it might not be so bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: stomf some stuff-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Something incredible...!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 72 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
